sql_array: CREATE TABLE normal_distribution_data (id UInt64, value Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO normal_distribution_data SELECT number, randNormal(0, 1) FROM numbers(10);
SELECT id, value, value + randNormal(5, 2) AS adjusted_value FROM normal_distribution_data;
UPDATE normal_distribution_data SET value = value * 2 WHERE id % 2 = 0;
SELECT AVG(value) AS average_value FROM normal_distribution_data WHERE value > randNormal(3, 1.5);
